text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, try putting what I've told you into practice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Remember, only accelerate at the last second,
once you're coming out of the turn.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll give it my best shot!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Look at her go. It's as if she's a whole new runner
now. And it's all thanks to your guidance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My guidance? Haha. Well, don't stop there.
Please heap on all the praise you can.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. To tell the truth, I was merely
parroting the advice my trainer gave to me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I thought he would appreciate it if I passed on
your praise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I thought she would appreciate it if I passed on
your praise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I have to say it's rather gratifying to see
one's own trainer praised.
